---
title: "Interactive Demos"
toc: false
format:
  html
---

### Why this?

This page contains a collection of the interactive demonstrations written as playable [Marimo notebooks](https://docs.marimo.io). 

These examples are designed to complement analytical derivations in mass transfer, by turning mathematical models into interactive components.

### Examples in lecture notes

- [(L31) Full Cooling Tower Simulation ](./scripts/L31_enthalpy_chart_full.html)
